name: AI Persona OS
description: The complete operating system for OpenClaw agents. 24 souls (JARVIS, Thanos, Mary Poppins, Rook...), SOUL.md Maker, memory tools, Discord routing fix, native heartbeat, never-forget context. By Jeff J Hunter.

workspaceOverride.description: Optional override for the workspace path. Takes precedence over agents.defaults.workspace and the $OPENCLAW_WORKSPACE env var.
